role_step.title: Choose your journey
role_step.desc: Are you looking to buy spare parts or sell them on the MLILA marketplace?
role_step.buyer_desc: Browse thousands of spare parts, request quotes, and manage your vehicle fleet.
role_step.seller_desc: List your inventory, receive quote requests, and grow your automotive business.

profile_step.title: Profile Picture
profile_step.desc: Adding a photo helps build trust within the marketplace.
profile_step.hint: Upload a clear photo of yourself or your store logo to build trust with other users.

contact_step.title: Contact Person
contact_step.desc: Your primary contact information for coordination.

location_step.buyer_desc: Tell us where you are located to find parts near you.
location_step.seller_desc: Establish your business presence on the marketplace.

specialties_step.title: Your Portfolio
specialties_step.desc: Select the vehicle brands and part categories you specialize in.

toast.fill_fields: Please fill all required fields correctly
